hintDisplay: Sujeto: El desarrollador backend / Verbo: poder (habilidad/capacidad) / Verbo: autenticar / Complemento: al usuario / Complemento: sin credenciales adecuadas
spanishSentence: El desarrollador backend no podría autenticar al usuario sin credenciales adecuadas.
correctSentence: The backend developer could not authenticate the user without proper credentials.

hints: Complemento: usando puntos de interrupción y declaraciones de registro

correctSentence: The developer should debug the code systematically by using breakpoints and logging statements.

correctSentence: As a frontend developer, you should animate UI elements carefully to avoid performance issues.

spanishSentence: Como el arquitecto, deberías planificar la escalabilidad del sistema y la arquitectura de microservicios antes de que el equipo de desarrollo comience a codificar.
correctSentence: As the architect, you should plan the system's scalability and microservices architecture before the development team starts coding.

correctSentence: They don't have to review the code if the automated tests pass successfully.

spanishSentence: No podremos desplegar la aplicación sin arreglar los errores críticos primero.
correctSentence: We won't be able to deploy the application without fixing the critical bugs first.

correctSentence: The team could test the new features before the deployment.

correctSentence: The DevOps engineer may not scale the application without proper monitoring in place.

correctSentence: The developer must compile the code before submitting the pull request.
